headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Atmos Energy (ATO) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
summary: Wondering if Atmos Energy at around US$185 per share is still good value or if the easy gains are behind it? This article walks through what the current price might be implying. The stock has been relatively steady in the very short term with a 0.3% decline over 7 days and a 1.3% return over 30 days, but the longer term numbers are stronger with a 9.6% return year to date, 19.5% over 1 year, 74.5% over 3 years and 102.6% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Atmos Energy as a large US...
